summary.intent: Wire the existing CRM subsystem into the gateway's channel event pipeline so that inbound messages automatically create/update contacts and log interactions.
summary.outcome: The QA phase was initiated; a minor dead-code cleanup (unused `args` variable in `channel_events.rs`) was committed, but the actual CRM integration work had not yet been implemented — the session ended at the pre-QA cleanup stage.

repo: CRM subsystem is fully built at storage/RPC layers (CrmStore trait, SqliteCrmStore, MemoryCrmStore, 16 RPC methods, RetentionEngine) but has zero integration with channel_events.rs
GatewayChannelEventSink uses Arc<tokio::sync::OnceCell<Arc<GatewayState>>> for state access — CRM store is NOT in GatewayState, only in LiveCrmService
CrmService trait mandates JSON (serde_json::Value) round-trips; for internal gateway use, CrmStore trait should be used directly to avoid overhead
The auto_create_contacts config field in CrmConfig is defined but never read anywhere in the codebase
channel_webhook_dedup.rs handles HTTP-level dedup upstream; CRM interaction dedup is not implemented and accepted as duplicate-tolerant
Project uses raw epoch math for timestamps (SystemTime::now()) rather than the time crate
SQLite WAL mode is used, enabling concurrent reads during CRM write operations

code.finding: GatewayChannelEventSink is the hook point for CRM integration — add Option<Arc<dyn CrmStore>> and CrmConfig fields here, gate with #[cfg(feature = "crm")], and spawn async CRM work inside emit() for InboundMessage events
Must pass Arc<dyn CrmStore> and CrmConfig to GatewayChannelEventSink constructor; reuse the crm_store already created for LiveCrmService

workflow: Headless orchestration sessions use a Linear comment as a persistent workpad — update at each milestone with status, decisions, and next steps
Session startup protocol: run type-check and tests before any implementation to verify clean baseline
The QA skill snoozes gstack auto-upgrades when running headlessly to avoid interactive prompts
Uncommitted changes (even minor cleanup) should be committed before running QA to ensure a clean diff baseline

friction: Working tree had uncommitted dead-code changes (unused `args` variable) that needed to be cleaned up before QA could proceed cleanly
CrmStore is buried inside LiveCrmService and not accessible from GatewayState — requires threading it through to GatewayChannelEventSink at construction time
open_items: Contact merge/dedup — same person on multiple channels creates separate contacts; needs future ticket
Outbound interaction logging — only inbound messages will create interactions; outbound is deferred
CRM Web UI — contact timeline in web dashboard; separate ticket needed
GDPR/privacy documentation — auto-created contact records from inbound messages have privacy implications; needs documentation
Matter auto-creation from messages — deferred, manual only for now
Interaction dedup — accepted as duplicate-tolerant; retention engine handles growth
crm.contacts.auto_created, crm.interactions.logged, crm.errors metrics — planned but gated behind #[cfg(feature = "metrics")]
The actual CRM integration implementation (handle_crm_inbound helper, emit() hook, server.rs wiring, tests) — session ended before implementation began
